a_wilson_95_upper_0_of_100.note: Doc says ~3.6%, leo mail says ~0.0357 — exact Wilson is 0.036993 (3.70%). Both prior estimates are approximations.

notes: Wilson upper: exact formula z^2/(n+z^2) with scipy.stats.norm.ppf(0.975).
Rule-of-three: 3/100 = 3.00% — Wilson (3.70%) is the binding upper bound.
McNemar all-one-side: min b+c=6 for two-sided p<0.05. b+c=5 gives p=0.0625 (FAIL).
A null verdict at n=100 near p~=0 is underpowered: deltas below ~6pp invisible.
